source_pr.title: executor: fix unstable TestSelectAsOf
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: yisaer <disxiaofei@163.com>

<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/25897

Problem Summary:

The testcases used `NOW()` function and assert the stale read tso accuracy by `sleep` which will be unstable in ci env when meeting cpu resource shortage

### What is changed and how it works?

This pr fix it by injecting pre-defined value for `NOW()` which avoid the above-mentioned problem


### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

```release-note
None
```
